head: 5adba0798ffa07c81682976de478902506f6866e
reason: Per brief §1.3/§5 STOP rule: 5 of 10 required API functions have NO backend route. MISSING: createCohort (no POST /community/cohorts), inviteMember, assignClient, removeMember (cohort member rows not exposed — only member_count), listInboxItems (no aggregated unanswered endpoint), Lab drafts/scheduled. Whole-repo grep confirms none exist outside src/community either; invite-codes/sub-coaches modules are roster/team onboarding, unrelated to community cohort membership. Moderation enum is hide|warn|ban|dismiss — brief's 'escalate' does not exist.
recommendation: Option A: descope to 3-4 screens (Home, read-only Cohorts, read-only CohortDetail, full Moderation) consuming the 5 existing routes. Option B: hold v1-6 mobile until backend adds cohort-create/invite/member + coach inbox endpoints. Orchestrator decides scope.
